title: Engineer, Product & Process
description:
Job Description:

  • Own end-to end product and process responsibility for precision CNC-machined parts from NPI through stable mass production.
  • Lead the development, validation, and optimization of CNC machining processes, including tooling, fixturing, and cutting strategy.
  • Drive FAI, qualification builds, and technical readiness for semiconductor equipment customers.
  • Actively lead yield, cycle time, scrap, and cost reduction initiatives using data-driven problem solving.
  • Provide direct, hands-on shopfloor leadership during setup, ramp-up, and complex machining issues.
  • Work cross-functionally to translate customer requirements into robust manufacturing processes.
  • Represent manufacturing engineering in customer technical discussions, audits, and continuous improvement reviews.

Job Requirement:

  • Degree in Mechanical or Mechatronics Engineering, or related discipline.
  • Minimum 7+ years of hands-on experience in precision CNC machining (milling and/or turning, multi-axis preferred).
  • Proven track record owning tight-tolerance, high-mix, low-volume precision parts to mass production.
  • Strong mastery of engineering drawings, GD&T, and machining feasibility analysis.
  • Deep practical knowledge of process development, tooling strategy, fixturing, and cycle optimization.
  • Demonstrated experience leading NPI, FAI, and engineering change execution with minimal production disruption.
  • Comfortable operating as shopfloor-focused engineer, not desk-bound, in a fast-paced manufacturing environment.
  • High level of ownership, technical judgement, and communication ability when interfacing with customers and internal teams.
  • Hands-on experience with PLM systems (e.g. Siemens Teamcenter), CAD tools (e.g. SolidWorks) and NX CAM will be a strong added advantage.
  • Willing to work on-site at Changi North Crescent.

postedCompany.description:
Your Trusted Partner in Semiconductor Innovations

What We Do

At NOVA-TECH, we understand the complex technology challenges faced by semiconductor customers and we aim to work collaboratively alongside with our customers to bring innovative products to market. Our innovative solutions – Engineering Design, Manufacturing and Supply Chain, all processes tightly controlled to build the confidence and reliability of our customers. With a global customer base, an experienced team and at-scale manufacturing facilities, we are creating an impact with our customers.
postedCompany.name: NOVA-TECH MFG PTE. LTD.
